summary: Muddy, overly bright recording with weak Dylan/Bob Weir moments and a confusing set order.
review: The audience‑type recording is muddy and excessively bright, making many of the Bob‑led tunes sound terrible. The concert itself feels disjointed – Tom Petty’s brief appearance and a rushed Dylan cover left the floor cleared, while the overall setlist is considered just okay. Reviewers consistently rate it low, citing both audio and performance issues.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews give 2‑star ratings and point to poor sound quality and a lackluster, uneven performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Sound described as way too bright and muddy; lacks clarity, especially on songs featuring Bob Weir.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set order appears off compared to the rest of the tour; floor cleared after Tom Petty/Dylan spots, overall pacing feels uneven.
